explanation: The passage is highly coherent and contains precise, domain-specific experimental details (e.g., 4-aminoantipyrine, 3–21 h hydrothermal treatment, FT-IR, 13C/1H NMR, HR-TEM, XRD) that are common in AI-generated abstracts. While such content can be produced by human authors as well, the uniform, polished style without obvious experimental caveats raises the probability that it was AI-generated.
